meta.title: Manage an Existing Booking · MNVV Transfer | Dean on Deck
meta.description: Already have a Virgin Voyages booking or a My Next Virgin Voyage (MNVV) voucher? Transfer it to Dean on Deck as your First Mate — no rebooking, no fees, same fare. Unlock Sailor Loot and RockStar perks.
meta.ogTitle: Make Dean your First Mate — transfer your Virgin Voyages booking
meta.ogDescription: Hand over an existing Virgin Voyages reservation or MNVV voucher. No rebooking, no fees, same fare — just perks and hands-on service.

content.heading: Make me your *First Mate.*
content.lede: Already holding a Virgin Voyages reservation or a My Next Virgin Voyage (MNVV) voucher? Hand it over — no rebooking, no fees, and your fare stays exactly the same. I'll take it from here and unlock the Sailor Loot and perks you should be getting.
content.checkboxLabel: I request that **Dean Satterfield (On Deck)** be assigned as my First Mate / Travel Advisor for this booking.

steps.d: Drop your booking or MNVV voucher number below — that's all I need to find it.
Virgin moves your reservation under me as your First Mate. Your price and itinerary don't change.
Sailor Loot, priority windows, and hands-on planning kick in for a trip you've already started.

aside.note: Prefer to talk it through first? Reach me directly and I'll walk you through the transfer.
